title: Dark Web Intercept: Exploit_Forum_X - Potential Threat Activity

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Dark Web Intercept: Exploit_Forum_X - Potential Threat Activ
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/19
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*polyfill.io*'
            - '*malicious-polyfill-update.net*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
